arts.ttl: Rangers thrash Nice to ease pressure on Clement
arts.sum: Hamza Igamane starred as Rangers cruised to a 4-1 win in Nice to ease the pressure on under-siege manager Philippe Clement and boost their chances of progressing to the knockout phase of the Europa League.

arts.ttl: Hamza Igamane on target as four-star Rangers run riot in Nice
arts.sum: The 22-year-old Moroccan, making his first European start, grabbed his second goal in the 54th minute.

arts.ttl: Rangers pile on misery for Sir Jim Ratcliffe as Man Utd not the only headache for INEOS supremo
arts.sum: Rangers cruised to a massive Europa League win over Ratcliffe's other side

arts.ttl: Rangers roar to brink of Europa League qualification as Igamane shines and Dessers should be banned – 5 talking points
arts.sum: It was a remarkable night for Rangers on Cote d'Azur as Philippe Clement got the huge win he needed

arts.ttl: Philippe Clement explains Rangers decision to drop Cyriel Dessers against Nice
arts.sum: Rangers manager Philippe Clement has explained his decision to drop Cyriel Dessers for the crunch clash against Nice in the Europa League - stating that Hamza Igamane needs the minutes to develop for the much-alluded to 'rebuild'. "This is his first time at this stage so I'm really curious to see how he reacts in that way, but it's also the project we need to do, to give chances to the young players to develop and to get experiences like Connor Barron had a few months ago.

arts.ttl: Rangers penalty 'shambles' eviscerated by Ally McCoist as ref accused of going beyond handball with VAR sin
arts.sum: Bizarre scenes overtook the Europa League clash as Ricardo de Burgos examined the incidents

arts.ttl: Gio van Bronckhorst in Rangers repeat as Besiktas boss faces sack after Maccabi Tel Aviv humbling
arts.sum: The Europa League upset has sparked major doubts over the Dutchman's future
